creator: mike@bayphoto.com
text:
On 10/25/2012 7:40 PM, Mark Felder wrote:
> On Thu, 25 Oct 2012 23:38:02 +0000 (GMT)
> Michael Carlson <mike@bayphoto.com> wrote:
>
>> Puppet's documentation also says that facter 1.6.2 is a requirement for 3.0, but sysutil/facter is still at 1.6.11
> Isn't 1.6.11 greater than 1.6.2? (11 > 2) or is this upstream using
> some really horrible/bizarre versioning scheme? I know that the ports
> tree definitely sees 1.6.11 as greater than 1.6.2.
haha man do I feel bashful right about now :)

Double digit versions always throw me off, I apologies.

That aside, would it still be a reasonable request to create a puppet30 
port and let that bake for a bit? I was a bit shocked this morning when 
a few clients updated to 3.0 and were in a unusable state.
